messages.content: You are a helpful assistant that extracts structured troubleshooting actions.
My laptop battery drops from 80% to 20% in like an hour after the latest update. What should I check first?
Start by checking battery health, background process usage, and whether the recent update changed power settings.
You are a helpful assistant that extracts structured troubleshooting actions.
My phone connects to Wi-Fi but apps keep saying no internet. Browser sometimes works, sometimes not.
Check DNS resolution, captive portal issues, router connectivity, and whether only specific services are failing.

document.title: Inference API latency spike in us-west

sections.heading: Impact
sections.content: P95 latency increased from 420ms to 3.8s for approximately 17 minutes.

sections.heading: Cause
sections.content: A bad cache invalidation pattern caused repeated prompt-template recompilation.

sections.heading: Resolution
sections.content: Rolled back template cache change and restarted affected workers.

summary: Inference latency spiked in us-west due to repeated prompt-template recompilation after a cache invalidation issue. Rolling back the cache change restored service.

messages.content: You are a helpful assistant that extracts structured troubleshooting actions.
My monitor says no signal unless I unplug the dock and reconnect it two or three times.
Check cable seating, dock firmware, monitor input selection, and whether the dock is underpowered.
